entities.name: Akiflow
entities.context: Task and calendar management tool where tasks are routed

entities.name: Task Routing Protocol
entities.context: Decision framework that determines how tasks are routed based on confidence levels

entities.name: Zo API
entities.context: API used for extracting tasks from message content

entities.name: Gmail
entities.context: Channel used to send tasks to Akiflow

entities.name: Confidence-based Routing
entities.context: Three-tier system (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) determining auto-route vs confirmation vs chat response

entities.name: Duration Detection
entities.context: Automatic detection of task duration from text, overridable via --duration flag

entities.name: Project Taxonomy
entities.context: Classification system for organizing tasks into projects

entities.name: Aki
entities.context: AI assistant profile/persona for Akiflow integration

relationships.context: Protocol uses confidence tiers to determine routing behavior
Akiflow organizes tasks using the project taxonomy
Aki is the dedicated profile for Akiflow integration
Zo API extracts structured tasks from natural language
Tasks are sent to Akiflow via Gmail
Prefix explicitly signals intent to route to Akiflow
